title: TRIED Preflight-Safe Training Record
description: One Step 5 training input row consumed by orchestrator.dataset.main from data/preflight_safe.jsonl. This schema mirrors shared.models.PreflightSafeRecord: a slim generated training task that already passed eager-vs-Inductor preflight. It is not shared with eval; held-out eval rows use schema/eval/eval_corpus_record.json.

example_id.description: Source/code UUID from corpus generation. Multiple preflight-safe rows may share this when the same PyTorch code is exercised with different shapes, seeds, or tolerance policies.

pytorch_code.description: Materialized PyTorch function source generated for training. The row has already passed AST checks and preflight before reaching data/preflight_safe.jsonl.

input_shapes.description: Shape of each input tensor, as a list of integer lists.

input_dtypes.description: Dtype of each input tensor. Length must match input_shapes.

rng_seed.description: RNG seed used to generate input tensors. Fixed per dataset task for reproducibility.

tolerance_policy.description: Policy selected during corpus generation/preflight and reused by the dataset verification loop. The dataset loop must not recompute this.
